payload.label: rug
payload.long_description: Rectangular narrow cream/ivory runner rug with orange-pink floral motifs at the ends, a thin darker border and faint decorative script along the center; flat-woven, low-pile appearance and partially cropped at the image edges, estimated about 0.8–1.2 meters from the camera.
